description: Use this API to output the profile curves within one profile set in the matrix format. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.4.2. ierr = tspf_output_pmatrix_2(profile,optacc)

parameters.name: optacc
parameters.description: An array of 3 elements specifying profile output options. (input).

optacc.description: Start time point. when start time point is less than 0, all time points are simulated (-1, by default).
end time point. when end time is less than start time, only start time point is simulated (1 by default).
report all profile curves in the given profile set.
report profile curves assigned to elements in the given profile set.
report profile curves assigned to elements with non-schedule mode in the given profile set.
report profile curves assigned to elements with schedule mode in the given profile set.

error_codes.description: No profile curves defined in profile curve set.
Time point not found in the profile curve set.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
